title: Lichess Game
description: A single Lichess game as returned by the games API. Captures core metadata, players, clock, opening, and the move record.

id.description: Short Lichess game identifier, typically eight characters.

rated.description: True if this is a rated game affecting player ratings.

variant.description: Chess variant played in this game.

perf.description: Rating pool (perf) the game belongs to.

createdAt.description: Game creation timestamp in milliseconds since the Unix epoch.

lastMoveAt.description: Timestamp of the last move played, in milliseconds since the Unix epoch.

source.description: How the game was created (lobby, friend, ai, api, arena, swiss, position, import, etc.).

initialFen.description: Starting FEN. Present for variants or positional games where the start is not the standard initial position.

winner.description: Color of the winner if the game has a winner.

ply.description: Number of plies that match the named opening.

moves.description: Space-separated list of moves in PGN SAN notation. Only present when requested in the export query.

pgn.description: Full PGN of the game. Only present when requested in the export query.

totalTime.description: Estimated total game time in seconds.

daysPerTurn.description: Correspondence days per turn (only set for correspondence games).

tournament.description: ID of the parent Arena tournament if the game is part of one.

swiss.description: ID of the parent Swiss tournament if the game is part of one.

analysis.description: Per-ply Stockfish evaluation when computer analysis has been requested.

aiLevel.description: Stockfish level when the player is the AI.

ratingDiff.description: Rating change applied after the game.

berserk.description: True if the player berserked in an Arena game.

team.description: Team identifier when the game is part of a Team Battle Arena.
